text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yukino, you do your own braiding, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! So long as I look at pictures, I can do Dutch braids and French braids now! Oh, and this one's Dutch!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you really are good... The stitches are so
even. And it goes great with your hair band. It's
honestly the cutest I've seen.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? C-cute? Aw, come on, City, you're just
being nice!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it if I didn't mean it. You deserve
serious praise.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can I ask you to do mine sometime? A crown
braid just like yours.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Shucks... Th-that's too much for li'l ol' me... I get
butterflies just look'n at that beaut'ful, fancy city
girl hair of yours, let alone touch'n it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, my hair's important to me. That's why I
need to leave it to a pro like you.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-all right then! I'll sure give it my best shot!
Y-you can count on me!
